dashboard.label: Readiness
dashboard.description: Environment readiness status for Alpha Level managed alert scoring. All checks must pass before enabling the puller.

search.query: | rest /servicesNS/-/TA-alphalevel-alert-refinery/storage/collections/config | search title IN ("alphalevel_scores", "alphalevel_readiness") | stats count as present | eval check_name = "kvstores_present", _key = check_name | eval status = if(present >= 2, "ok", "fail"), severity = "high" | eval last_run = now(), last_ok = if(status="ok", now(), null()) | eval detail = "kvstores_present=" . present . "/2" | eval remediation = "Reinstall the TA or run splunk reload - the shipped collections.conf should create these automatically." | fields _key, check_name, status, severity, last_run, last_ok, detail, remediation | append [ | rest /servicesNS/-/TA-alphalevel-alert-refinery/data/props/lookups | search stanza="source::*" attribute="LOOKUP-alphalevel_scores" | stats count as wired | eval check_name = "auto_lookup_wired", _key = check_name | eval status = if(wired > 0, "ok", "fail"), severity = "high" | eval last_run = now(), last_ok = if(status="ok", now(), null()) | eval detail = "auto_lookups_on_source_wildcard=" . wired | eval remediation = "The shipped props.conf defines the auto-lookup on [source::*]. If missing, check for conflicting local/props.conf overrides." | fields _key, check_name, status, severity, last_run, last_ok, detail, remediation ] | append [ search `alphalevel_sources` earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count as events_seen | eval check_name = "source_indexes_populated", _key = check_name | eval status = case(events_seen > 0, "ok", events_seen == 0, "fail"), severity = "high" | eval last_run = now(), last_ok = if(status="ok", now(), null()) | eval detail = "events_seen=" . events_seen . " in last 24h" | eval remediation = "Update the alphalevel_sources macro (or alphalevel_custom_sources) to point at indexes that contain your alerts." | fields _key, check_name, status, severity, last_run, last_ok, detail, remediation ] | append [ search `alphalevel_sources` earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count by index, sourcetype | stats values(sourcetype) as sourcetypes, sum(count) as total_events | eval check_name = "sourcetype_coverage", _key = check_name | eval status = if(total_events > 0, "ok", "warn"), severity = "medium" | eval last_run = now(), last_ok = if(status="ok", now(), null()) | eval detail = "sourcetypes=" . mvjoin(sourcetypes, ",") | eval remediation = "Confirm the listed sourcetypes are the ones Alpha Level should score." | fields _key, check_name, status, severity, last_run, last_ok, detail, remediation ] | append [ search `alphalevel_sources` earliest=-24h latest=now | head 5000 | `alphalevel_normalise` | fieldsummary maxvals=0 | eventstats max(count) as total_events | rename field as field_name | lookup alphalevel_required_fields field as field_name OUTPUT required, min_non_null_pct | where required="true" | eval non_null_pct = round(100 * count / total_events, 1) | eval field_ok = if(non_null_pct >= tonumber(min_non_null_pct), 1, 0) | stats sum(field_ok) as ok_fields, count as total_fields, values(eval(if(field_ok=0, field_name . "(" . tostring(non_null_pct) . "%)", null()))) as failing | eval check_name = "schema_conformance", _key = check_name | eval status = case(ok_fields = total_fields, "ok", ok_fields >= total_fields - 1, "warn", 1=1, "fail"), severity = "high" | eval last_run = now(), last_ok = if(status="ok", now(), null()) | eval detail = "required_fields_passing=" . ok_fields . "/" . total_fields . if(isnotnull(failing), " failing=" . mvjoin(failing, ","), "") | eval remediation = "Update alphalevel_normalise in local/macros.conf to map your SIEM fields to the required schema." | fields _key, check_name, status, severity, last_run, last_ok, detail, remediation ] | append [ search index=`alphalevel_internal_index` sourcetype=alphalevel:heartbeat earliest=-1h | stats max(_time) as last_heartbeat | eval heartbeat_age_seconds = now() - last_heartbeat | eval check_name = "puller_heartbeat", _key = check_name | eval status = case(isnull(last_heartbeat), "fail", heartbeat_age_seconds < 900, "ok", heartbeat_age_seconds < 3600, "warn", 1=1, "fail"), severity = "high" | eval last_run = now(), last_ok = if(status="ok", now(), null()) | eval detail = if(isnull(last_heartbeat), "no heartbeat seen in last hour", "age=" . round(heartbeat_age_seconds, 0) . "s") | eval remediation = "Check that the Alpha Level puller is enabled, egress IP can reach MGMT port 8089, and the HEC token is valid." | fields _key, check_name, status, severity, last_run, last_ok, detail, remediation ] | append [ search index=`alphalevel_results_index` sourcetype=alphalevel:result earliest=-1h | stats count as events, max(_time) as last_event | eval last_event_age_seconds = now() - last_event | eval check_name = "result_flow", _key = check_name | eval status = case(events = 0, "warn", last_event_age_seconds < 1800, "ok", last_event_age_seconds < 7200, "warn", 1=1, "fail"), severity = "medium" | eval last_run = now(), last_ok = if(status="ok", now(), null()) | eval detail = "events_last_hour=" . events . if(isnotnull(last_event), ", age=" . round(last_event_age_seconds,0) . "s", "") | eval remediation = "If events=0: the puller is not running or HEC is dropping events. Cross-reference with the puller heartbeat check." | fields _key, check_name, status, severity, last_run, last_ok, detail, remediation ] | append [ search `alphalevel_sources` earliest=-1h latest=now | head 50 | eval hash_direct = sha256(_raw) | eval raw_copy = _raw | eval hash_roundtrip = sha256(raw_copy) | eval match = if(hash_direct == hash_roundtrip, 1, 0) | stats count as sampled, sum(match) as matched | eval check_name = "hash_stability", _key = check_name | eval status = case(sampled = 0, "unknown", matched = sampled, "ok", 1=1, "fail"), severity = "high" | eval last_run = now(), last_ok = if(status="ok", now(), null()) | eval detail = "stable_hashes=" . matched . "/" . sampled | eval remediation = "A process is mutating _raw after ingest. Inspect props.conf for _raw-mutating transforms." | fields _key, check_name, status, severity, last_run, last_ok, detail, remediation ] | eval status_icon = case(status="ok", "PASS", status="warn", "WARN", status="fail", "FAIL", 1=1, "?") | eval check_label = case( check_name="kvstores_present", "KV stores", check_name="auto_lookup_wired", "Auto-lookup", check_name="source_indexes_populated", "Source indexes", check_name="sourcetype_coverage", "Sourcetype coverage", check_name="schema_conformance", "Schema conformance", check_name="puller_heartbeat", "Puller heartbeat", check_name="result_flow", "Result flow", check_name="hash_stability", "Hash stability", 1=1, check_name) | eval last_run_str = strftime(last_run, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval last_ok_str = if(isnotnull(last_ok), strftime(last_ok, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "-") | sort - severity status | table status_icon, check_label, severity, detail, last_run_str, last_ok_str, remediation | rename status_icon as "Status", check_label as "Check", severity as "Severity", detail as "Detail", last_run_str as "Last run", last_ok_str as "Last OK", remediation as "Remediation"

| inputlookup alphalevel_readiness | stats count(eval(status="fail")) as failing, count(eval(status="warn")) as warning, count(eval(status="ok")) as ok, count as total | eval label = case(failing > 0, "NOT READY", warning > 0, "DEGRADED", 1=1, "READY") | eval value = label . " (" . ok . "/" . total . ")" | fields value
| inputlookup alphalevel_readiness | stats count(eval(status="fail")) as failing | fields failing

index=`alphalevel_internal_index` sourcetype=alphalevel:heartbeat earliest=-1h | stats max(_time) as last_heartbeat | eval value = if(isnull(last_heartbeat), "never", tostring(round(now() - last_heartbeat, 0)) . "s ago") | fields value
index=`alphalevel_results_index` sourcetype=alphalevel:result earliest=-1h | stats count as value
`alphalevel_sources` earliest=-24h latest=now | timechart span=1h count by sourcetype useother=t limit=10
index=`alphalevel_results_index` sourcetype=alphalevel:result earliest=-24h latest=now | timechart span=1h count by al_determination

panel.title: Field conformance (sample of last 5,000 in-scope events)

search.query: `alphalevel_sources` earliest=-24h latest=now | head 5000 | `alphalevel_normalise` | fieldsummary maxvals=0 | eventstats max(count) as total_events | rename field as field_name | lookup alphalevel_required_fields field as field_name OUTPUT required, min_non_null_pct, notes | where isnotnull(required) | eval non_null_pct = round(100 * count / total_events, 1) | eval status = case(required="true" AND non_null_pct >= tonumber(min_non_null_pct), "pass", required="true", "FAIL", non_null_pct >= tonumber(min_non_null_pct), "ok", 1=1, "low") | sort - required, - non_null_pct | table status, field_name, required, non_null_pct, min_non_null_pct, notes | rename status as "Status", field_name as "Field", required as "Required", non_null_pct as "Non-null %", min_non_null_pct as "Target %", notes as "Notes"
